343511.「待て。女王様は今 騎士団長殿から\n 重要な報告を 受けておられるところだ。\:
Hold it. Her Majesty is currently receiving
an important report from the Commander.
You'll need to wait for an audience with her.

343512.「王国軍に同行し 行方知れずになってしまった\n 兄について 急ぎ おうかがいし:
This is urgent...I need to ask about my
brother, who went missing with the royal army.
Isn't there anything you can do?

343513.「むう……。\n それは なんとかしてやりたいが\n 自分の一存で 報告の邪魔を:
Hmm... I'd like to help, but...I don't have
the authority to interrupt such an important
report.

343514.「今のが 騎士団長のハーディオ殿だ。\n 報告が終わったようなので 入ってよいぞ:
That was Hadio, Knight Commander. It appears
he's finished his report, so you may enter.
Just be sure to show proper etiquette inside.

343515.「お初にお目にかかります 女王様。\n 私は カラマドの町から来た アンネリゼ。:
It's an honor to meet you, Your Majesty.
I am Anneliese from Calamad, and this
is my friend, <pc>.

343516.「ソルベルム王国へ よくぞ 参られた。\n 私は この国を治める セリーナだ。:
Welcome to the kingdom of Solbelm.
I am Celina, the ruler of this land.

343517.「私のもとを訪れるとは 何か 困りごとか？\n 遠慮せずに 申すがいい。:
There must be some reason that you've come to
see me. Whatever it is that troubles you,
please speak.

343518.「私の兄…… カラマドの町の守備隊\n カラマドの剣の隊長をしている\n ローマ:
I'm looking for my brother... His name is
Romas. He is captain of the Sword of Calamad,
which serves as our garrison.

343519.「こちらの国で 任務をいただき\n 行方不明になってしまったと 聞いて……:
I heard that he went off on a mission here,
and has since gone missing...

343520.「ええっ ほ…本当に！？\n あなたは ローマスさんの 妹さんなの？\n ああ:
What?! A-are you seriously Romas's
little sister?! Oh my gosh...

343522.「……そうか。その件については\n こちらも 申し訳なく 思っている。:
I see. About what's happened...you have my
apologies as well.

343523.「先日のことだ。近隣のカルサドラ火山に\n 全身フード姿の 不審者が現れたという:
Just the other day, we received a report that
a suspicious hooded man appeared in the nearby
Calsadora Volcano. Romas was here, too.

343524.「それを聞くと 彼の目の色が変わってな。\n その不審者が 魔皇軍と 関わりがあ:
Upon hearing that, his demeanor changed. He suggested that the suspicious man might have some connection to the Dark Despot's army,
and volunteered to accompany the investigation effort.

343525.「ローマス殿は 騎士団員 数名とともに\n カルサドラ火山へと 向かった。\n:
Along with several of our knights, he set out
for the volcano. However...

343526.「調査の途中 強大なチカラを持つ\n 謎の魔物と遭遇し 戦いの末\n 消息を 絶:
During the investigation, he encountered a
strange monster that held an immense power.
After fighting it...he vanished without a trace.

343528.「うわさに名高い カラマドの剣の隊長を務める\n ローマス殿ほどの戦士が そう簡:
I know that the renowned leader of the Sword
of Calamad would not fall so easily.

343529.「彼を助けるため 急ぎ 騎士団から\n 救出隊を送る手はずを ととのえている。\:
We've made urgent arrangements to dispatch a
rescue team to help find him. We ask that you
wait patiently and trust that we will.

343530.「いえ！ 私たちも どうか\n その救出隊に 同行させてください。\n 兄さんの:
We can't! Please let us join the rescue team.
I'm just too worried about him to stand
around and wait...

343531.「……いいだろう。\n 兄を案ずる そなたの心情は\n おおいに 理解できる。:
Very well. I fully understand your concern
for your brother.

343532.「救出に関しては 騎士団長に まかせている。\n 先ほど この部屋を出ていった男:
The rescue operation is in the hands of our
Knight Commander, Hadio. He is the man who
left just before you came in.

343533.「彼に 直接 話を通すのが早かろうな。\n 今は この階にある 騎士団の詰所で\:
It would be quickest if you spoke to him
directly. I believe he is forming the rescue
team in his quarters as we speak.

343534.「もし 難色を示すようなら\n 私から 許可を得たと 言えばよい。\n ……そな:
And if he is to refuse...simply say you have
my explicit permission.
Blessings be upon you...

343535.「感謝いたします 女王セリーナ様……！: Thank you so much, Your Majesty!

343536.<pc>たちは 玉座の間を あとにした。:
<pc> and co. leave the
throne room.

343537.「ローマス兄さんは 火山の調査に同行したのね。\n 無事でいてくれると いいのだ:
Romas went along with the investigation inside
the volcano, right? I sure hope he's safe...

343538.「<pc>。女王は たしかに\n カルサドラ火山……って 言ったキュ。:
<pc>... The queen definitely
said "Calsadora Volcano", kyu.

343539.「アストルティアの ドルワーム王国の近くにある\n 火山も カルサドラ火山キュよ:
The volcano near Dolworm Kingdom in Astoltia
is ALSO called Calsadora, isn't it, kyu?

343540.「でも ここは ドルワーム王国じゃなくて\n ソルベルム王国って いうみたいだキ:
But this place is called Solbem, not Dolworm,
kyu... Just what does this mean, kyu?

343541.「<pc>さん キュルル？\n ふたりで なんのお話を しているの？:
Oh, Kyururu? Just what are the two of you
talking about?

343542.「なんでもないキュ。気にするなっキュ！: It's nothing. Don't worry about it, kyu!

343543.「それじゃ <pc>さん。\n 騎士団の詰所へ 行ってみましょう。:
Okay... Let's head over to the knights'
quarters.

343544.「我々は今 重要な任務の前だ。\n 部外者の入室を許可した 覚えはないぞ。:
We're in the middle of preparing for an
important mission. I don't recall allowing
any outsiders to enter.

343545.「あなたが ハーディオ団長ですね。\n お願いします。ローマス兄さんの救出隊に\:
You are Captain Hadio, yes? Please...you
have to let us join in your search for my
brother Romas!

343546.「兄さん……？\n 君は ローマス殿の妹だと 言うのか？:
Brother...? You're saying you're Romas's
sister?

343547.「はい。アンネリゼと申します。\n こちらは 兄と私の友人……\n <pc>さん:
I am. My name is Anneliese.
And this is <pc>, a friend of my
brother's.

343548.「そうか。君が ローマス殿の……。\n いかにも 私が ハーディオだ。\n この:
I see... So you really are his sister.
Yes, I am Hadio. I serve as commander
of this kingdom's knights.

343549.「……君たちには まず ローマス殿の身に\n 何があったのかを 話しておくべきだ:
I suppose it'd be best if I first told you
what happened to Romas...

343550.「私は 協力を申し出てくれた ローマス殿と\n 少数の騎士を連れて 不審者の調査:
Romas and I headed to Calsadora Volcano with
a small team of knights to investigate the
appearance of that strange man...

343551.「火山の中に入り 捜索をしたものの……\n 報告にあった 不審者の姿は 見当たら:
We went inside and began our search, but the
man was nowhere to be found... So we continued
deeper into the volcano.

343552.「そこに ヤツが……。\n おそろしく 強い魔物が 現れたのだ。:
And that's when it happened...
A terrifyingly powerful monster had appeared.

343553.「あんな魔物は これまで見たことがない……。\n ローマス殿が いてくれたとて\:
I've never faced such a monster before...
Even with Romas's help, we stood no chance
with such a small group.

343554.「ついに 我々は 追い詰められた。\n そのとき ローマス殿が 自らオトリとなり:
We found ourselves cornered... It was then
that Romas decided to act as decoy to draw
its attention away.

343555.「おかげで 我々は逃げおおせることができたが\n ローマス殿を 火山に残してきて:
We managed to escape thanks to him, but we
had to leave him behind... I can't express
how deeply sorry I am...

343556.「いいえ。\n 兄さんが 自分で決断したことですもの。\n ハーディオ団長が 謝:
No...it was Romas's decision. You don't have
any reason to apologize.

343557.「それに まだ 兄さんが 生きていると\n 信じてくださって いるのでしょう……:
And you still believe he is alive, don't you?
That's why you're assembling a rescue team.

343558.「……ああ その通りだ。\n 我々は 必ず ローマス殿を見つける。\n だが あ:
Yes, that's right... We will surely find him.
But you cannot come with us.

343559.「この任務は 大きな危険をともなうもの。\n 妹である あなたを巻き込んでしまっ:
This is just too dangerous of a mission.
If I were to get you involved, I'd never be
able to face Romas again...

343560.「どんな危険が 待ち受けていようとも\n ただ 待っているだけは 嫌なんです……:
It doesn't matter how dangerous it isーI
refuse to just sit idly and wait. I was even
granted permission by Her Majesty.

343561.「そうか。女王が……セリーナが 許可を。\n まったく……王となったというのに\:
Is that so... Celina gave you permission?
Honestly...even though she's queen now,
that soft side of hers hasn't changed...

343562.「……わかった。同行を許可しよう。\n カルサドラ火山へは この国の東にある\n:
All right. I'll let you come along. You can
enter the volcano via the Calsadora Camp
in the eastern part of this region.

343563.「準備が ととのい次第\n キャンプで 落ちあうということで\n かまわないか？:
Once we finish our preparations, we will
meet you at the camp. Is that acceptable?

343564.「ありがとうございます！\n 私たちも すぐに 向かいます。: Thank you so much! We'll leave right away.

343565.「アウザーと ブータルの２名は\n カルサドラキャンプへ 先行してくれ。\n 情:
Auzer, BurtalーI want the two of you to
head for the camp and gather any information
you can.

343567.「<pc>さん。\n 兄さんを助けるため 東にあるという\n カルサドラキャンプ:
Let's make our way to the Calsadora Camp.
It's to the east of here!

343568.「あそこに 落っこちているのは\n 大地の三闘士の 像じゃないキュ？\n でも:
Isn't that one of the statues of the Earthen
Triad lying over there, kyu? But it's all
destroyed, kyu...

343569.「ボクの 知っている歴史では\n 観測されていない 事象だキュ……。\n この時:
Nothing like this has ever happened in the
history I know of, kyu... Something is
definitely wrong in this era, kyu.

343570.「待たせたな。まずは 先行させた騎士から\n 集めた情報を 聞くとしよう。:
Sorry to keep you. We should first hear from
the knights who came here before us to see
if they gathered anything.

343571.「報告します！ キャンプで情報を集めたところ\n 不審者の新たな目撃情報は あり:
I've something to report! After gathering some information here, no one has seen that suspicious man. Romas has not been seen
anywhere either.

343572.「やはり ローマス殿は まだ\n 中に 取り残されているのではないかと……。\n:
I suspect that he's still trapped inside...
I sent Auzer ahead to scout inside the
volcano.

343573.「また 以前よりも 火山の活動が\n 活発になっていると 情報が入っております。:
We've also been informed that volcanic
activity has risen. We need to make sure we
take that into account as well...

343574.「わかった。我々も これより\n 火山の内部……カルサドラ溶岩窟に突入する。\n:
Got it. We'll make our way to the Calsadora
Channel inside the volcano. Rememberー
stay vigilant!

343576.「あそこから カルサドラ溶岩窟へ 侵入し\n ローマス殿とはぐれた 火山の深部を:
We'll enter the Calsadora Channel from over there to head to the depths of the volcano where we left Romas. We'll take point,
so please follow closely behind us.

343577.「ご心配 ありがとうございます。\n みなさんも どうか お気をつけて……！:
I appreciate your concern in everything.
Please be careful, all of you!

343578.「……何を グズグズしている？\n 始めたまえ。:
What are you dawdling for?
Hurry up.

343579.「クッ 秘宝を手にしたのは 俺だというのに\n 手柄を 横取りされてしまうとは\:
Ggh... I'M the one who retrieved the treasure,
yet HE gets all the credit? How utterly
infuriating...

343581.「ほう……またしても 邪魔者が現れたか。\n この大陸は なかなか 見込みがあり:
Oh ho...yet another nuisance appears.
This land shows much promise.

343583.「まさか……。ローマス兄さんたちを襲った\n おそろしく 強い魔物というのは……:
It can't be... That's the strong monster that
attacked Romas...

343584.「そんな ささいなことを\n 問うている余裕が あるのかね？\n まもなく 滅び:
The moment of your destruction is nearly
here...yet you think you have the luxury of
questioning such trivial things?

343585.「さて 諸君らに それが 防げるものか……。\n ゆっくり 見物させていただくと:
Just try and stop it...if you think you can.
This will be quite the enjoyable show.
Hmm hmm...hahahahaha!

343588.「まともに戦って 勝てる相手じゃないわ。\n ここは いったん 退いて！！:
This isn't a battle we can hope to win now.
We need to retreat!

343589.「でも せっかく来たんだし ちょっとだけ……！:
But since I DID come all this way...
Maybe just a little more...

343590.「ごめんッ やっぱり ムリ！\n 逃げるわよ～～～っ！！:
Sorry, it's no good!
Run away!!

343591.「ふう……。追ってこないってことは\n アレが 完全に復活して 動きだすには\n:
Whew... It isn't following us, which means
it probably needs some time to recover
before it can move again.

343592.「それにしても 今 この地に 魔皇軍を見ても\n 恐れずに 立ち向かう人がいるな:
But I wasn't expecting to see anyone here who
could stand up to the Dark Despot's army!
The two of you did great!

343593.「助けていただき ありがとうございます。\n もうダメかと 思いました……。:
Thank you for saving us.
I thought we were finished for sure...

343594.「アハハッ。アレは ヤバかったわね。\n まともに食らったら 消し炭どころじゃな:
Ahaha... That was pretty dangerous, you know.
If you had been hit head on, even your ashes
would've been blasted to bits.

343595.「あの炎の岩みたいなのは いったい……？\n 火山活動で 生まれたものなんですか:
That flaming rock thing we saw...just what is
it? Is it because of the volcanic activity?

343596.「アレは 喝欲の邪神ガルザンド。\n 太古の昔に 神との戦いに敗れ\n この地に:
That's Galzand, one of the Dark Deities. They
were all sealed away a long time ago in a
battle against the gods.

343597.「勇者の導きの統領から 任務を授かって\n この大陸に やってきたんだけど\n:
I came to this land on mission from the Hero's
Herald. Can't say I was expecting something
like this to happen, though...

343599.「あっ！ 自己紹介を 忘れてたわ！\n あたしの名前は ユキハ……っていうの。\:
Ah! Where are my manners... My name is Yukiha.
Nice to meet you both.

343600.「ユキハさんですね。私は アンネリゼ。\n こちらは 私の友人 <pc>さんです:
Yukiha... I am Anneliese, and this is my
friend <pc>.

343601.「勇者の導きっていうのはね。\n 最近 各地で 動きを見せ始めている魔皇軍と\n:
The Hero's Herald is an organization that swears to fight the Dark Despot's army, as they've started showing signs of activity
in regions all over.

343602.「こっちじゃ あまり 大っぴらに\n 活動してないみたいだから 知られてないか。:
They're not very active around these parts, so
it's no surprise you've never heard of them.
I'm actually a member of that group.

343603.「キミ……。前に どこかで\n 会ったことが あるような気がするキュ。:
You... I feel like I've met you somewhere
before, kyu.

343604.「うわあ なにコレ！ <pc>のペット？\n ちっこくて まるくて その上しゃべ:
Wow, what is this?! Is this your pet,
<pc>?! It's tiny, round, AND can
talk?! I've never seen anything like it!

343605.「キュキュキュ～～ッ！？ 何しやがるキュ！\n は～な～せ～キュ～～ッ！！:
H-hey! What are you doing, kyu?!
Let...me...go...kyu!!!

343606.「彼は キュルルといって\n 私たちの お友達なんです。\n どうか いじめない:
That's Kyururu...he's a friend of ours.
Please be gentle with him.

343607.「あの……ユキハさん。\n 私 この火山で 行方不明になった\n 兄のローマスを:
Um, Yukiha...I'm looking for my brother
Romas. He went missing somewhere inside
this volcano.

343608.「髪をひとつに結んでて 鎧を着込んでいて……。\n そんな人を 見かけませんでし:
He has his hair tied back and is wearing
armor. Have you seen anyone like that?

343610.「お兄さんのことは 心配だけど……\n 今は あの邪神をどうにかする手を考えない:
I want to help you find your brother, but... right now we need to worry about that Dark Deity. If we don't deal with it, then this
whole continent will go up in flames.

343611.「そうですね……。\n もし あの邪神が火山を出て 暴れはじめたら\n カラマド:
You're right... If the Dark Deity were to come
out from the volcano, then Calamad would be
in danger too...

343612.「遅れて すまない。\n 魔物の群れに遭遇して 対処に手間取った。\n 数名のケ:
Apologies for the delay. We ran into a horde
of monsters and had trouble dealing with
them...and several of us were injured.

343613.「それより……何があった？\n アウザーによれば 焦熱の間に\n とんでもない化:
But more importantly...what happened? Auzer
told us that a huge monster emerged from
the Molten Core.

343614.「魔皇軍の連中が 邪神ガルザンドを\n 復活させてしまったのよ。\n まったく:
Those guys under the Dark Despot revived
the Dark Deity Galzand. What a real pain...

343615.「邪神ガルザンドだと！？\n 神話に語られる 凶悪な邪神ではないか。\n ……待:
Galzand?! Isn't that one of the Dark Deities
spoken of in myth? Wait...before thatー
just who are you?

343616.「勇者の導きの一員 ユキハよ！\n そう言う あんたは ソルベルム王国の\n 騎:
I'm Yukiha of the Hero's Herland.
You're a knight of Solbelm, right?

343617.「勇者の導き……。\n うわさは 聞いたことがある。\n 魔皇軍と戦う組織が 実:
The Hero's Herald...? I've heard rumors, but
I never imagined the organization fighting the
Dark Despot's army was real!

343618.「期待させてたら 悪いんだけど\n さすがのあたしでも アレは 生身じゃ無理。\:
Sorry to dash your hopes, but even someone
like me stands no chance against that thing.
I wouldn't go anywhere near it.

343619.「復活したばかりの邪神は まだ動けない。\n その間に 対策を練らないと！:
Since it was just revived, it still can't
move. We have to come up with a plan
while we have the advantage!

343620.「……わかった。\n 急ぎ ソルベルム王国へ 戻ろう。\n 女王にも 報告せねば:
All right. Let's hurry back to Solbelm.
We need to report this to Her Majesty.

343621.「アンネリゼ殿。\n すまないが この状況では\n ローマス殿の捜索は……。:
Anneliese... I'm sorry, but trying to search
for Romas with things as they are just
isn't possible...

343622.「あの邪神がいては\n 兄さんにも 危険が及ぶかもしれません。\n 私も 協力さ:
My brother may be in danger with that Dark
Deity around. Please let me help!

343623.「では 皆も 玉座の間に 集まってもらえるか。\n 邪神の様子を 聞かせてもらい:
Could all of you make your way to the throne
room? I'd like to discuss more about this
Dark Deity.

343624.「アウザー。\n お前は ここに残って 監視を続けてくれ。\n 邪神に動きがあれ:
Auzer, stay here to keep monitoring the
situation. If the Dark Deity begins to move,
report back immediately.

343626.「そなたたちには\n たいへん 危険な目に あわせてしまい\n 申し訳ないと 思:
I am truly sorry for having put you all in
such grave danger.

343627.「邪神ガルザンドが 復活したことは\n 騎士団長より すでに 報告を受けている。:
Hadio has already informed me about the Dark
Deity's revival. This situation will surely
shake the very foundation of this country...

343628.「早急に 邪神への対策を 立てねばならぬが\n 有効な手立てが 見つからなければ:
We must quickly devise a countermeasure to combat it...but if we can't find anything effective, then we may have no choice but
to evacuate everyone here.

343629.「邪神が 完全にチカラを取り戻すまで\n まだ 猶予がありそうです。\n その間:
We've still some time for it fully recovers
all of its power. We just need to deal with
it while we still have the opportunity.

343630.「もしかして あなたがユキハさん？\n 勇者の導きの方が この国にも\n 来てく:
Are you Yukiha, by chance...? You have NO idea
how happy I am that one of the Hero's Herald
has come here!

343631.「光栄です セリーナ様。国と民をこよなく愛す\n 可憐で聡明な女王……陛下のこと:
It's an honor, Miss Celina. A lovely and wise queen who deeply loves her country and her people... Your reputation precedes you all
throughout Yumagram.

343632.「ええっ。\n そんなぁ 可憐で 聡明だなんて……。\n 照れちゃうわ……。:
Oh my... Lovely, and wise...?
You're making me blush...

343634.「……勇者の導きの勇士 ユキハ殿。\n かの組織のうわさは 我が国にも届いている:
Yukiha, brave warrior of the Hero's Herald...
Rumors of your organization has reached here
as well. A pleasure to meet your acquaintance.
